mapper.select: select * from aiw_user_role where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and role_code = #{roleCode} and scope_code = 'GLOBAL'
select distinct user_biz_id from aiw_user_role where role_code = #{roleCode} and is_deleted = 0

select count(distinct ur.user_biz_id) from aiw_user_role ur inner join aiw_role r on r.role_code = ur.role_code inner join aiw_role_permission rp on rp.role_code = ur.role_code where rp.permission_code = #{permissionCode} and ur.role_code != #{excludedRoleCode} and ur.is_deleted = 0 and ur.effective_from <= current_timestamp(3) and (ur.effective_to is null or ur.effective_to > current_timestamp(3)) and r.status = 1 and r.is_deleted = 0 and rp.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user_role (biz_id, user_biz_id, role_code, scope_code, effective_from, effective_to, created_at, created_by, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{roleCode}, #{scopeCode}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update role_code = values(role_code), scope_code = values(scope_code), effective_from = values(effective_from), effective_to = values(effective_to), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update: update aiw_user_role set is_deleted = 1, effective_to = current_timestamp(3) where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and role_code = #{roleCode} and is_deleted = 0
update aiw_user_role set is_deleted = 1 where user_biz_id = #{userBizId}
